name: agent-coordination-skills
description: Focused coordination strategies for agent teams, from peer deliberation and blind arbitration to proof splitting, handoffs, and integration.

interface.shortDescription: Focused, evidence-backed strategies for coordinating agent teams
interface.longDescription: Choose a precise collaboration strategy for direct peer dialogue, blind adjudication, parallel proof, causal falsification, shared artifacts, gated handoffs, vertical slices, or adversarial review.
defaultPrompt: Choose the smallest agent coordination strategy that fits this task and run it with explicit proof and stop conditions.
